title: 纪安安短打满垒 - 打席与方向修复
prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 bright daylight sports anime keyframe for HomeRun Epic 001 Accident v0.3. Correct baseball logic is critical. Scene: Ji Anan #2 from Beizhou Voyager is the batter, wearing white uniform with deep navy helmet and small warm orange accents. She is in a legal batter box beside home plate, squared to bunt with the bat held softly over the front of home plate, not standing on the base path and not facing the wrong direction. Camera is low from the first-base side near home plate: home plate is in the lower foreground, the third-base line runs diagonally toward the viewer's left, and the baseball is a normal white ball rolling slowly along the third-base line to the left foreground after a successful bunt. Bases are loaded: show one runner breaking from third toward home, one runner leaving second, one runner leaving first. Chengnan Meteors are on defense in white uniforms with meteor red and black accents: catcher #8 rises behind home plate, pitcher #3 charges forward, third baseman #23 charges from third base. Dugout teammates react in the background. Realistic amateur baseball tactics, clear player placement, bright sunny summer field, clean HomeRun avatar-inspired anime style. No fireball, no glowing ball, no magical energy, no impossible physics, no night lighting, no dense readable text. Leave lower third safe for Chinese subtitles.

title: 强袭地滚球 - 城南流星守备队服修复
prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 realistic bright daylight anime baseball keyframe for HomeRun Epic 001 Accident v0.3. Correct team uniforms are critical. Offense is Beizhou Voyager in white uniforms with deep navy caps/helmets and warm orange accents. Defense is Chengnan Meteors, and every visible fielder must wear white uniforms with meteor red and black accents, red or black caps, and no Voyager navy H marks. Moment: Lin Che #7 of Beizhou Voyager has hit a hard ground ball through the gap between third base and shortstop. The ball is a normal white baseball rolling fast on tan infield dirt with realistic motion blur and dust only, not glowing. Foreground: Chengnan Meteors third baseman Xia He #23 dives late toward the ball in red/black-trimmed uniform. Midground: Chengnan Meteors shortstop Zhao Ran #12 lunges from shortstop, also red/black-trimmed. Background: Beizhou Voyager runners sprint around the bases. Camera is low at infield dirt level, sunny green field, high-energy but believable sports anime action, clear contrast between red/black defenders and navy/orange offensive runners. Absolutely no fireball, no flames, no golden energy streak, no magic, no explosion, no superhero effect, no night floodlights, no fake UI, no dense readable text. Leave lower third safe for subtitles.
